title: Invero Pack of 8 Metal Stainless Steel Corner Braces 90 Degree Joint Right Angle L Shaped Bracket Joiner 1.5-Inch - Ideal for Wooden Furniture, Cabinets, Shelves, Desks, Chairs and More
features: HIGH QUALITY CORNER BRACES: They are made from high-quality stainless steel that can support up to 50 pounds per brace (200 pounds total).

MODERN DESIGN: The basic braces have a modern look that would be welcome in any modern or contemporary home. Because they're metal, they won't leave marks like wooden braces. You can use them in the garage or garden shed if they're not exposed to dampness or sunshine.

RESISTANT MATERIALS: The corner braces are resistant to rust and corrosion, so you don't have to worry about them becoming weak over time. The stainless steel material means these pieces will last longer than materials that aren't as durable and sturdy.

DURABLE AND STURDY: This pack of 8 corner braces is composed of durable metal so they won't bend or break easily. The components can be used to assemble furniture or bookshelves or coffee tables. They polish your desk or bookshelves.
GIFT IDEA: This pack of eight corner braces would be a suitable gift for anyone who wants to create a sturdy structure out of wood at home.
description: Product Description These corner braces are made of high-quality stainless steel and can support up to 50 pounds per brace (200 pounds total). With a modern design, these braces can be used in any modern or contemporary home and won't leave marks like wooden braces. Resistant to rust and corrosion, these corner braces are durable and will last longer than materials that aren't as sturdy. The 8 corner braces in this pack are made of durable metal and can be used to assemble furniture or polish up your desk. This pack of corner braces would make a great gift for anyone who wants to create a sturdy wooden structure at home.
